abilities.name: Don't Mind Me
abilities.text: The following do not restrict this model from taking the Interact action: being engaged, leaving engagement with a Walk, and targeting a marker with an enemy in base contact.

abilities.name: Elusive
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel.

actions.name: Electric Whip
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has an Entranced token, move the target up to 2".

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

triggers.name: Convulsions
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3". Then, the target must either discard a card or this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Veiled Derringer
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may remove a friendly Entranced token from the target.
actions.effects: When resolving, if a token was removed, this model adds a suit of its choice to the final duel total.

triggers.name: Foiled Plans
triggers.text: Target must remove an enemy Scheme marker from anywhere in play. If it cannot, it is dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

actions.name: Secret Passage
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may only be declared if this model is within 1" of blocking terrain.
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within range within 1" of blocking terrain.

triggers.name: Soundrel
triggers.text: Once per turn. Look at the top three cards of the opposing player's face deck and place them back in any order.
